hero.badge: The new driving school platform in Bulgaria
hero.description: Drivio connects students, instructors, and driving schools in one intelligent platform. Book lessons, track your progress, and get your driving license easier than ever.

features.heading: Everything you need
features.description: Drivio provides a complete toolkit for students and driving schools to make the learning process easier and more efficient.

items.title: Online booking
items.description: Book practical lessons easily through the platform, anytime.

items.title: Theory training
items.description: Access interactive lessons, tests, and exam prep materials.

items.title: Progress tracking
items.description: Track your progress in real time with lessons, scores, and exam readiness.

items.title: Stats and analytics
items.description: Detailed reporting for driving schools to optimize training.

items.title: Student management
items.description: Complete management system for students and instructors.

items.title: Data security
items.description: Your data is protected with modern encryption technologies.

students.heading: Get your license easier
students.description: Drivio helps you find the right driving school and track your full progress in one place, without unnecessary complexity.
benefits: Find the most suitable driving school for you
Book lessons online without phone calls
Track your progress in real time

steps.title: Choose a driving school
steps.description: Browse and compare driving schools in your area.

steps.title: Enroll
steps.description: Sign up and choose a training schedule that fits you.

steps.title: Finish the course
steps.description: Learn the theory, gain practical experience, and pass your exam.

schools.heading: Digitize your driving school
schools.description: Modern tools to manage students, instructors, and your full driving school operations.

benefits.title: Increase revenue
benefits.description: Reach more students through our platform.

benefits.title: Digital documentation
benefits.description: Keep all documents in one place with easy access.

benefits.title: Fast setup
benefits.description: Start working in minutes, not days.

benefits.title: 24/7 support
benefits.description: Our team is always available to help.

joinForm.title: Request to Join Drivio
joinForm.description: Submit your school and contact details. Superadmin will review and approve your request.
joinForm.error: Could not submit request. Please try again.

footer.summary: Digitalizing the future of driving courses in Bulgaria through innovative technology and automation.

questionForm.title: Ask a question
questionForm.description: Send your question and we will reply to your email.
questionForm.success: Question sent. We will respond to your email.
questionForm.error: Could not send your question. Please try again.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept", you consent to our use of cookies.
